form.formComment: Good run 10.8L third behind Jaeger Man at Maure-de-Bretagne over 2850m 6-11yo handicap on March 24. Was disqualified last start on April 6 at Ecommoy over 2750m 6-7yo handicap. Ignore last run and assess on its third two starts back; No surprise if he made amends.

form.formComment: Resumes. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 4.1m finishing second behind Kheops Dore at Vincennes over 2200m in a 5yo gelding race on November 27 at $2.70. Plenty to like about his prospects.
